name: sembraniteam-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins by Sembrani Team for architecture design, database design, feature planning, git workflows, changelog management, and systematic debugging.

plugins.name: archimind
plugins.description: Design and review system architectures, database schemas, and feature modules with three-option comparison and visual Mermaid diagrams in a local browser viewer.

plugins.name: changelog-manager
plugins.description: Automatically generate and update CHANGELOG and RELEASE_NOTES files from git commit history with bilingual, platform-specific support.

plugins.name: debugging-workflow
plugins.description: Systematic debugging workflow — pre-flight checklist, context gathering, root cause analysis, fix, multi-language verification, and parallel hypothesis investigation

plugins.name: git-helper
plugins.description: Generate conventional commit messages and branch names from git context and user descriptions.

plugins.name: perfmind
plugins.description: Performance investigation assistant for web, mobile, desktop, and API applications
